Class OrderItem

java.lang.Object
OrderItem
public class OrderItem extends Object
Represents one row to be inserted in the Order_Items table. Posseses the following elements
  • Order Item Id
  • Parent Order's unique id
  • Item being referenced in the order
  • Quantity of the item's being bought
  • Price at the time of the order being placed

  • Constructor Details

    • OrderItem

      public OrderItem()
      Default Constructor

    • OrderItem

      public OrderItem(int orderId, int itemId, int quantity, double priceAtSale)
      Constructor taking all parameters. Represents one row in the Order_Items table
      Parameters:
      orderId - Parent order's unique id
      itemId - Unique id of the item being referenced
      quantity - Quantity of the item being purchased
      priceAtSale - Price of the item at the time the order was placed

  • Method Details

    • setOrderItemId

      public void setOrderItemId(int orderItemId)
      Set the object's orderItemId local record to the given value
      Parameters:
      orderItemId - Value to be set into the object

      public int getOrderItemId()
      Retrieve local record of orderItemId data
      Returns:
      Integer object holding the orderItemId data

      public int getOrderId()
      Retrieve the object's OrderId (parent's ID) data

      Integer object holding parent object's id data

      Set the local record of object's parent id to the given value
      Parameters:
      orderId - Parent Id value to be set

    • getItemId

      public int getItemId()
      Retrieves the id value of the item associated with the object
      Returns:
      Integer value holding unique identifier of product item being referenced

    • setItemId

      public void setItemId(int itemId)
      Updates local record of item unique id field value of the object
      Parameters:
      itemId - ItemId value to be set in the object

      public int getQuantity()
      Retrieves local quantity record of the object

      Integer object holding the quantity data of the object

      Updates local record of quantity data in the object

      quantity - Value to be set in the object

      public double getSalePrice()
      Retrieves local record of sale price data held in object
      Returns:
      Double value holding sales data

    • setSalePrice

      public void setSalePrice(double priceAtSale)
      Updates local record of price at sale data field in the object
      Parameters:
      priceAtSale - Sales data in the object to be set

    • addTopping

      public OrderTopping addTopping()
      Creates a child Topping object. Allows to effectively add toppings to a specific object
      Returns:

    • getTotal

      public double getTotal()

    • insertOrderItem

      public void insertOrderItem(Connection connection)
      Inserts the order_item into the respective table. Receives a unique id from the order_item and prompts all its related toppings to be inserted.
      Parameters:
      connection - Database Connection
